title: Runtime validation on 1039/45425 for provenance links

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runtime validation pending. Blocked on operator confirmation to run live verification now that schema-less provenance path is in place.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Blocking issue: dashboard runtime TypeError in Next dev (webpack factory undefined / cannot read properties of undefined reading call). Investigating as regression from recent /lab/data and evaluation provenance changes; fixing before continuing runtime validation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Diagnosed runtime crash cause: concurrent Next dev processes writing to dashboard/.next produced webpack cache corruption (incorrect header check) and missing vendor chunks (react-day-picker.js), which surfaced as TypeError reading 'call'. Mitigation confirmed: single Next dev process + clean .next cache restores /lab/reports and /lab/evaluations.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applying route clarity change: use /lab/data/sources and /lab/datasets as canonical dataset/source dashboards. Updating navigation and internal links accordingly, and removing active /lab/data/datasets usage.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented route clarity cutover: canonical sources route is /lab/data/sources and canonical datasets routes are /lab/datasets and /lab/datasets/:id. Removed tabbed /lab/data page and /lab/data/datasets/:id route, updated navigation + report/evaluation dataset links + docs. Verified with dashboard build:fast (success).
